transcript.text:
I can see the bass
Really?
There it is!
It's bass!
[Too excited]
Do it for me!
[Tzuyang's first bass catch?]
That's really big
No, no We have to catch it!
Oh, that was a tree? I'm sorry
I finally caught one!
Yay!
But will this fill me up?
Hello everyone~
I'm going to Cheongyang County right now
I've been watching his YouTube channel for a while now

He is good at making bass dishes
So I'm on my way to try his cooking
It's him
[YouTube Jinseokgi]
This is such a good size to eat
It looks delicious
[Master at cooking bass]
[Spicy Seafood & Bass Noodles]
[Bass Pepero (Pocky)]
[Bass Ice Cream]
[Bass Sous Vide Steak]
[Walking through obstacles to meet Jinseokgi]
He's over there
Hello! Mr. Jinseokgi
Hello!
How did you come all the way here?

Are you fishing right now?
He really fishes in the middle of nowhere
Props to you for coming here
Nice to meet you, hello
Are you here to catch bass?
I don't think I can catch any
You can do it!
I watched you catch bass from your channel
I was wondering how it tastes like
You will be able to catch one yourself
Do you have any experience?
No, it's my first time
I went catch webfoot octopus before
You should be fine as long as you cast well
I'll teach you how to cast
Don't worry too much, you should be fine

Okay
Just think of it as you're tossing it at a 45 degree angle
Just like that!
You're going to learn fast
Hehehe. I'm a fan
You did it! That's good!
You can catch bass now
If I want to get full,
We'll have to catch at least 20
You eat 20 packs of Ramyun noodles
[Fishing time!]
[Professional fisherman]
[Already got 1?]
It's there
Here it comes
Amazing

This one is too small
It's not big enough for you
Come follow me, you can catch 1
I need to catch 30 of these to get you remotely full
That's 1 bite
What is this wristband?
Oh, this?
I told my daughter I'm going fishing with Tzuyang
And she gave me this as a good luck charm
Really
[No bass to be seen]
I should do a chestnut mukbang if I can't catch any bass
[A while later..]
They're all hiding because Tzuyang is here
[Finally a bite?]
It just moved

It's moving Reel!
You're right! Is it a fish!?
It ran away!
It must have been a really big one
It ripped! I should have given it to you
No, you did a great job Really
[Telling Tzuyang it's okay]
Did something pull? Yes
I saw the rod flick
Right, it was moving
So close! Yes, that was nice
Why was it so strong?
So close
I almost caught my very first fish
Oh it's your very first ever?
Yes

I almost got to experience that historic moment together
[Focusing again]
Why? Why!? Should I go in the water?
Why is it not coming out?
Wait, I think it ran I'm not sure
It's heavy
[Jinseokgi to the rescue]
Reel it in for me
Okay I got this You caught it
It's a bass!
Please do it for me!
Help me!
Oh, that's why it wasn't reeling in
[The bass is stuck on the branch]
I better go in and get it out
[Ripped the fishing line]

That was so close again
It really was close
[Complimenting Tzuyang as much as possible]
[It's here!]
I got it Finally!
I'm scared!
I got it!
[Finally!]
I'm so good at this!
I just felt it for that one
It won't bite No no no, I'm scared
Is there a glove?
No need! You need to hold it bare hand
[Saying hello to her first catch]
[Teasing her]
Okay, fine fine

I'll stop
But it's your very first bass You need to hold it!
Please take it off my hands
It's all yours now
Please take it
Get the hook out!
I'm very scared Please take it
Thank you~
Tap it and say thanks
Thanks
I caught it here last time, so..
[First stage of fishing addiction]
I want to catch a big one!
Tzuyang, it's right in front of you
I had no idea
Your level of concentration is amazing!

I didn't even see it there
This one is tiny as well
Perfect for a bite
[Last stage of fishing addiction]
[Focused]
She got it!
All the way over there?
She casted pretty far
Who is she!?
[Jinseokgi to the rescue]
Why is it so big?
Wow, amazing!
[Comparing the sizes]
How did you manage to catch one this big?
Idk I just did it!
I have some that I caught earlier today

Let's go cook now, We should have enough
[Bass Master Jinseokgi]
[Bass dish challenge]
[Salt & Pepper]
[Batter]
[Fried Bass]
[Cheese Seasoning]
[Powder Sugar]
[Parsley]
[Its tail is the best cooking tool]
[Soy Sauce Bass Grill]
[Best seasoning paste combination]
[Chili Pepper Seasoned Bass Grill]
[Amazing]
I was only able to see your cooking from your channel
They look scrumptious

I did my best
Thank you so much
I've always wondered what it would taste like
from watching your videos
You know the biggest one you caught,
That's this right here
This is the Bass Galbi
It's just seasoned with chili pepper paste
We can just call it a bass galbi
Let's try it before it gets cold
Yes, dig in
I'm so curious
Bon Appetit
Yes, enjoy
How does it taste?
Do you like it?

It tastes good Right!?
Is it fishy at all?
Not at all, right?
I was very skeptical at first
A lot of people are like that
They say that I did something to the fish to get the smell out
A lot of assumptions
But today, I can prove them wrong
It's so good
They go really well with beer
That's all meat
Let me get a true taste
It's not fishy at all
Right?
And also, the dishes came out better than usual
There are some days that are like that

And that's today
You're just a great cook
No way, you just happened to catch a very delicious fish
Thank you
Be careful when eating it still
BassRinkle? (Seasoned fried bass)
Is it right?
Yes
There's no decided name for it yet
You can call it whatever Did you just make it up right now?
Baerinkle? It's funny
But this dish here
I know it varies by each person
But personally,
It tastes better than chicken
It's a lot more tender and it melts in your mouth

Not fishy at all either
And the texture doesn't feel like a fish It's very soft
How to say this..
Soft..
Thank you so much for the compliment
I feel honored, as a person that cooks
I think I can make it go extinct if they are always cooked like this
It's very possible if you are the one eating
You're just built different
You really do eat everything
This isn't even that much food
It's mostly because I've only watched you eat through my phone screen
An average person can easily finish all of this
No, I think this is about 4-5 servings
You're so good at eating
You don't eat fast, but just little by little

It's gone if I blink
Talk for a bit and look down to see it gone
I am very happy as the person that prepared this
Thank you Tzuyang
No, the pleasure is mine You did a great job
I can do it whenever you want as long as you can eat it like this
Thank you, it was an honor
The food was great
Thank you
I had so much fun today
I would always go fish by myself and cook by myself
But having company is so much more entertaining
It was a very healing moment
It was my very first time fishing, but I think I will officially start learning it now
It was so fun
I want to learn how to fish next time if you can make the time for me

Yes, I'm available whenever
Just call me, I'll be on standby
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
